items.title_en: Judge says lawsuit against Trump DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund will proceed
items.title_zh: 法官称针对特朗普司法部“反武器化”基金的诉讼将继续进行
items.desc_en: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche originally set up the fund as part of a settlement of a lawsuit by President Donald Trump against the IRS.
items.desc_zh: 代理司法部长托德·布兰奇最初设立该基金是为了解决唐纳德·特朗普总统针对美国国税局提起的诉讼。

items.title_en: Microsoft lifts price of Xbox consoles due to soaring component costs
items.title_zh: 由于组件成本飙升，微软提高了 Xbox 游戏机的价格
items.desc_en: Microsoft said it's increasing the price of Xbox game consoles after Apple announced price hikes for MacBooks and iPads.
items.desc_zh: 在苹果宣布 MacBook 和 iPad 涨价后，微软表示将提高 Xbox 游戏机的价格。

items.title_en: A trading opportunity is emerging in this AI infrastructure play, charts show
items.title_zh: 图表显示，人工智能基础设施领域正在出现交易机会
items.desc_en: Data centers demand massive amounts of electricity, and MasTec is a key player that can support the buildout.
items.desc_zh: 数据中心需要大量电力，而 MasTec 是支持扩建的关键参与者。

items.title_en: Bond ETF flows surge in hunt for yield: 'Market sniffing out something here,' says BlackRock exec
items.title_zh: 贝莱德高管表示，债券 ETF 流量激增，寻求收益：“市场正在嗅出一些东西”
items.desc_en: Bond investors are abandoning aggregate benchmarks in favor of a broad mix of fixed-income investments to maximize yield with the stock market on edge.
items.desc_zh: 债券投资者正在放弃总体基准，转而选择广泛的固定收益投资组合，以在股市紧张的情况下实现收益最大化。

items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves midday.
items.desc_zh: 这些是午盘涨幅最大的股票。

items.desc_en: "The only crop we're harvesting is what you planted: decades of mistrust," Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said in a social media post.

items.desc_en: Glyphosate, used in Roundup weedkiller, is the most commonly used weedkiller in agriculture, and it has long been linked to cancer claims.

items.title_zh: 奢侈品消费现在由体验和“遗产旅游”驱动

items.desc_zh: 据周三报道，该公司的收入从去年同期的 93 亿美元增长了四倍多，达到 414.6 亿美元

items.title_en: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
items.title_zh: 在充满不确定性的时期，地震对委内瑞拉造成毁灭性打击
items.desc_en: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.
items.desc_zh: 这两次地震发生在委内瑞拉时任领导人尼古拉斯·马杜罗被美军抓获后不到六个月。

items.title_zh: 由于内存短缺，苹果提高了 MacBook 和 iPad 的价格，并暗示还会有更多价格上涨

items.desc_zh: 蒂姆·库克上周表示，由于内存和存储成本飙升，苹果将提高价格。

items.desc_en: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.
items.desc_zh: 个人消费支出价格指数预计同比增长4.1%。

items.title_zh: 法国将健康警报提升至最高级别，欧洲热浪东移
items.desc_en: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.
items.desc_zh: 德国部分地区气温可能达到 40 摄氏度，而法国官员表示，年轻人中出现了因高温而死亡的情况。

items.desc_zh: 该航空公司通常向成人收取单程 8 英镑的费用，以便与年幼的孩子坐在一起。

items.desc_zh: 首都及其周边地区在 7.2 级和 7.5 级地震中遭受了最严重的损失，两次地震的发生时间相隔一分钟。

items.desc_zh: 但在立法者谴责特朗普的军事行动的第二天，预算面临着一场艰苦的战斗。

items.desc_en: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.
items.desc_zh: 随着气温飙升，法国被迫重新考虑其长期以来对空调的保留态度。

items.title_en: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
items.title_zh: GTA 6 售价 80 美元 - 实体版不包含光盘
items.desc_en: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。

items.title_en: Ukraine strikes knock out power in key city in Russian-occupied Crimea

items.desc_en: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.
items.desc_zh: 塞瓦斯托波尔在莫斯科任命的州长警告说，一些地区直到晚上才会停电。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工

items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击

items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。

items.desc_zh: 水分追踪设备充斥市场，但信息量是否太多？

items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.desc_en: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。
